name: Rainbow Trout Sake
recipeInstructions:
1. Take the trout out of the refrigerator 30 minutes before cooking.
2. Mix soy sauce, 6 tablespoons of sake, sugar, and ginger over medium heat in a pan. Stir to dissolve the sugar until it just comes to a boil.
3. Strain the mixture through a sieve into a clean bowl.
4. Combine 2 tablespoons of strained sauce with the remaining sake. Rub this mixture onto the inside and outside of each fish fillet.
5. Place the remaining sauce back in the pan over medium heat, reduce the heat, and simmer until it is reduced by half.
6. Preheat the broiler to a distance of about 4 inches from the fish.
7. Place the skin-side down on the preheated broiler rack for about 4 minutes, then remove.
8. Brush the fillets with the reduced sauce and serve.
Serves 4
